expected_scenario: I want to stay logged in so that I don’t have to re-enter my credentials
column3:
Feature: User Login
  Scenario: Stay logged in option
    Given the user is logged in
    When the user selects 'Stay logged in'
    Then the system keeps the user logged in without asking for credentials again

expected_scenario: I want to add items to my shopping cart so that I can purchase them later
column3:
Feature: Shopping Cart
  Scenario: Add item to cart
    Given the customer is logged in
    When the customer adds a product to the shopping cart
    Then the product appears in the shopping cart list

expected_scenario: I want to view my grades online so that I can track my academic progress
column3:
Feature: Student Portal
  Scenario: View grades online
    Given the student is logged into the portal
    When the student navigates to the 'Grades' section
    Then the system displays the student's grades

expected_scenario: I want to book appointments online so that I can schedule visits conveniently
column3:
Feature: Appointment Booking
  Scenario: Book appointment online
    Given the patient is on the clinic website
    When the patient selects a doctor and chooses a time slot
    Then the system confirms the appointment booking

expected_scenario: I want to transfer money between accounts so that I can manage my finances
column3:
Feature: Bank Account Management
  Scenario: Transfer money between accounts
    Given the customer is logged into their bank account
    When the customer initiates a transfer from one account to another
    Then the system moves the specified amount and shows a confirmation
